calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Apr-18-2014 Vacated

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-22-2013 Set For Trial On May-05-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jul-24-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. rULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT SEKOU BANKS' MOTION TO STRIKE the punitive damage prayer in the complaint is denied. Plaintiff pleads sufficient facts to support a claim for exemplary damages. "One who willfully consumes alcoholic beverages to the point of intoxication, knowing that he thereafter must operate a motor vehicle, thereby combining sharply impaired physical and mental faculties with a vehicle capable of great force and speed, reasonably may be held to exhibit a conscious disregard of the safety of others." Taylor v. Superior Court (1979) 24 Cal.3d 890, 897. Order signed in open court. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Anthony Vaughn #6185.
